data.name: adicionarquarto_passo1_comece_por_preencher_os_detalhes_fundame
data.value: Start by filling in your place’s basic details.

data.name: adicionarquarto_passo3_selecione_todas_as_comodidades_que_o_seu
data.value: Select all amenities your place offers.

data.name: adicionarquarto_passo4_carregue_novas_fotos_ou_arraste_as_exist
data.value: Upload new photos or drag existing ones to reorder.

data.name: adicionarquarto_passo4_arraste_e_largue_as_suas_fotos_aqui
data.value: Drag and drop your photos here

data.name: adicionarquarto_passo5_estamos_quase_a_terminar_defina_o_preco_
data.value: We’re almost done. Set the nightly price for your place.

data.name: adicionarservico_passo1_comece_por_preencher_os_detalhes_do_serv
data.value: Start by filling in the service details.

data.name: calendario_veja_e_gira_a_disponibilidade_dos_seus_a
data.value: View and manage the availability of your listings in one place.

data.name: detalhesquarto_este_alojamento_ainda_nao_tem_avaliacoes
data.value: This place has no reviews yet.

data.name: DetalhesServico_este_servi_o_ainda_n_o_tem_avalia_es
data.value: This service has no reviews yet.

data.name: Favoritos_ainda_n_o_adicionou_nenhum_alojamento_ao
data.value: You haven't added any accommodations to your favorites yet.

data.name: GerirAnuncios_adicione_edite_ou_remova_os_seus_quartos
data.value: Add, edit or remove your rooms and services.

data.name: HistoricoTransacoes_consulte_todos_os_seus_pagamentos_e_reem
data.value: See all your payments and refunds.

data.name: HistoricoTransacoes_n_o_existem_transa_es_para_mostrar
data.value: There are no transactions to display.

data.name: ListaAvaliacoes_veja_e_gira_todas_as_avalia_es_deixadas_
data.value: See and manage all reviews left on the platform.

data.name: ListaReservas_veja_todas_as_reservas
data.value: See all bookings for your accommodations and services.

data.name: PaginaPagamento_como_gostaria_de_pagar
data.value: How would you like to pay?

data.name: PaginaPagamento_preencha_os_seus_dados_e_os_detalhes_de_
data.value: Fill in your details and payment details.

data.name: CaixaDeEntrada_nao_existem_conversas_para_mostrar
data.value: There are no conversations to show.

data.name: CaixaDeEntrada_selecione_uma_conversa_para_ver_as_mensa
data.value: Select a conversation to view messages.

data.name: Index_nao_existem_conversas_para_mostrar
data.value: There are no conversations to show.

data.name: Index_selecione_uma_conversa_para_ver_as_mensa
data.value: Select a conversation to view messages.

data.name: Perfil_ainda_nao_fez_nenhuma_avaliacao
data.value: You haven't made any reviews yet.

data.name: Reservas_ainda_nao_efetuou_nenhuma_reserva
data.value: You haven't made any bookings yet.

data.name: ResultadosPesquisa_nenhum_servico_encontrado_com_os_criteri
data.value: No service matched the selected criteria.

data.name: ResultadosServicos_nenhum_servico_encontrado_com_os_criteri
data.value: No service matched the selected criteria.

data.name: ResultadosServicos_onde_procura_o_servico
data.value: Where are you looking for the service?

data.name: Servicos_onde_procura_o_servico
data.value: Where are you looking for the service?

data.name: PaginaPagamento_funcionalidade_pagamento_futuro
data.value: Payment functionality to be implemented in the future

data.name: MetodosPagamento_descricao
data.value: Add or delete payment methods securely and make bookings easier

data.name: GerirAvaliacoes_confirmar_apagar
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this review?

data.name: DetalhesReserva_confirmacao_cancelar
data.value: Are you sure? This action is immediate.

data.name: Reservas_confirmar_cancelamento
data.value: Are you sure you want to cancel this reservation?

data.name: Avaliacoes_selecione_classificacao
data.value: Please select a rating (1 to 5 stars) before submitting.

data.name: Servicos_selecione_data_por_favor
data.value: Please select a date for the service.

data.name: Reservas_defina_preco_valido
data.value: Set a valid price per night (greater than zero).

data.name: Quarto_deve_ter_cama
data.value: The room must have at least one double or single bed.

data.name: Anuncio_precisa_uma_imagem
data.value: Error: The listing must have at least one image.

data.name: DetalhesQuarto_datas_checkin_checkout
data.value: Please select check-in and check-out dates before continuing.

data.name: Aviso_erro_inesperado_tente_novamente
data.value: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

data.name: Aviso_erro_comunicacao_envio_resposta
data.value: A communication error occurred while sending the reply.

data.name: Mensagens_precisa_estar_logado
data.value: You need to be logged in to send messages.

data.name: ReservaConfirmada_sucesso_desc
data.value: Thank you for your reservation. We have sent a confirmation email with all the details.

data.name: Account_Login_InvalidAttempt
data.value: Invalid login attempt. Please check your username and password.

data.name: Account_Admin_Only
data.value: Only administrators can access this area.

data.name: Account_Admin_InvalidAttempt
data.value: Invalid login attempt. Please check your admin username and password.

data.name: Avaliacao_Error_MustStayBeforeReview
data.value: You can only review a room after completing a stay in it.

data.name: Avaliacao_Error_AlreadyReviewed
data.value: You have already left a review for this room.

data.name: Avaliacao_Success_Submitted
data.value: Your review has been successfully submitted. Thank you!

data.name: AvaliacaoService_Error_MustStayBeforeReview
data.value: You can only review a service after having used it (completed reservation).

data.name: AvaliacaoService_Error_AlreadyReviewed
data.value: You have already left a review for this service.

data.name: Avaliacao_Delete_NotAllowed
data.value: You are not allowed to delete this review.

data.name: Booking_Error_EndBeforeStart
data.value: The end date must be after the start date.

data.name: Booking_Error_DatesUnavailable
data.value: Sorry, the selected dates are no longer available. Please choose different dates.

data.name: Booking_Error_NotFoundOrDenied
data.value: Booking not found or access denied.

data.name: BookingMgmt_Error_CannotConfirm_DatesConflict
data.value: Unable to confirm this booking. There is already a confirmed booking for these dates.

data.name: BookingMgmt_Notification_StatusChanged_Format
data.value: The status of your booking #{0} has been changed to {1}.

data.name: Home_Validacao_PrecoMaiorZero
data.value: Price must be greater than zero.
